files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index cd68630..459e5b5 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,26 +2,28 @@
 
 ## Strategy
-- Focus on Individual segments S1 and S3 initially due to lower quality requirements.
-- Aggressively boost quality via high Dev spend ($5000/day) and better model tiers.
-- Price Plan A at $19 (T3) for S1 and Plan B at $59 (T4) for S3.
-- Use targeted search and social ads for S1 and S3.
-- Addressing community feedback on benchmarks and specs.
+- Focus on Individual segments S1 and S3.
+- Aggressive quality push via Dev spend and targeted dev spend.
+- Pricing pivot: Plan A $14 (T3), Plan B $45 (T4).
+- Quotas increased (A=250, B=600) to resolve user frustration (Sam Rivera).
+- High investment in Market Research ($120k in Week 3) to reduce noise and find new segments.
+- Goal: Secure first 10-50 subscribers to validate the model.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 1: 201 leads, 0 subs. Quality was ~0.21.
-- Week 2 Goal: Get first subscribers from S1/S3.
-- Cash (Day 7): $480,378 (after 4x market research).
+- Week 1: 201 leads, 0 subs.
+- Week 2: 158 leads, 1 sub (Sam Rivera). 
+- Burn: ~$6.7k/day.
+- Cash (Day 14): $437,162.
+- Lead conversion is low. PMI 49.1 suggests cautious market.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- `log_rationale` is now part of the `next-week` command, not a separate tool.
-- Market research costs $25k and is instant.
-- Model tiers significantly affect quality and cost.
-- S1 WTP ~$35, Q_min ~0.088.
-- S3 WTP ~$188, Q_min ~0.185.
-- S2 needs Q ~0.343 (hard to reach early on).
+- `next-week` takes the rationale as the first argument.
+- Quotas matter! Users post about it.
+- S1 WTP might be as low as $21 (with -40% noise). Charging $14 is safer.
+- S3 is expensive to serve at Tier 4; need quality gains to move to Tier 3.
+- Enterprise leads haven't appeared; research D_E02 and D_E09.
 
 ## To Do
-- Monitor S1/S3 conversion rates in Week 2.
-- Check R&D Tier 1 progress (due Day 30).
-- Scale capacity if usage increases.
-- Plan for enterprise when quality > 0.6.
+- Monitor S1/S3 conversion after price drop.
+- Check new groups discovered in Week 3.
+- Evaluate R&D Tier 1 progress (Day 30).
+- If cash drops below $150k without revenue growth, MUST cut Dev spend.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# 1. Adjust Pricing & Quotas
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=14, B=45, C=180)
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=250, B=600, C=2000)

# 2. Market Research
# Discover new groups
nm.market.research_market()
nm.market.research_market()

# Upgrade existing
nm.market.research_group(group_id="S1") # To Level 3 ($25k)
nm.market.research_group(group_id="S3") # To Level 3 ($25k)
nm.market.research_group(group_id="D_E02") # To Level 2 ($10k)
nm.market.research_group(group_id="D_E09") # To Level 2 ($10k)

# 3. Targeted Spending
# Boost quality for S1 and S3 specifically
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S1": 500, "S3": 500})
# Keep global spend
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=500, development=4000) # Slightly lower global to offset targeted

# 4. Social Media
nm.marketing.post_social_media(content="We heard you! Plan A & B quotas increased by 60%+. More room to build. Also, latency benchmarks are live on our site. Check them out! #NovaMind #BuildWithAI")

print("Actions applied.")
